'''vakudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ibota|ibota]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-k-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ibota|ibota]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| vakudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vækidhith|vækidhith]] || [[word:vækidhij|vækidhij]] || [[word:vækidhish|vækidhish]] || [[word:vækidhi|vækidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vakukudhuth|vakukudhuth]] || [[word:vakukudhuj|vakukudhuj]] || [[word:vakukudhush|vakukudhush]] || [[word:vakukudhu|vakukudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vakudhuth|vakudhuth]] || [[word:vakudhuj|vakudhuj]] || [[word:vakudhush|vakudhush]] || [[word:vakudhu|vakudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vakufdhuth|vakufdhuth]] || [[word:vakufdhuj|vakufdhuj]] || [[word:vakufdhush|vakufdhush]] || [[word:vakufdhuf|vakufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vakudhuthu|vakudhuthu]] || [[word:vakudhuju|vakudhuju]] || [[word:vakudhushu|vakudhushu]] || [[word:vakudhuku|vakudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vakudhuth|vakudhuth]] || [[word:vakudhuj|vakudhuj]] || [[word:vakudhush|vakudhush]] || [[word:vakudhu|vakudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vakudhuthul|vakudhuthul]] || [[word:vakudhujul|vakudhujul]] || [[word:vakudhushul|vakudhushul]] || [[word:vakudhukul|vakudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vakudhuthuthu|vakudhuthuthu]] || [[word:vakudhujuju|vakudhujuju]] || [[word:vakudhushushu|vakudhushushu]] || [[word:vakudhuku|vakudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vakudhuthun|vakudhuthun]] || [[word:vakudhujun|vakudhujun]] || [[word:vakudhushun|vakudhushun]] || [[word:vakudhukun|vakudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vakudhuthuoro|vakudhuthuoro]] || [[word:vakudhujuoro|vakudhujuoro]] || [[word:vakudhushuoro|vakudhushuoro]] || [[word:vakudhukuoro|vakudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
